title: Market Pulse Pro Lower
author: NPR21
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Market Pulse Pro Lower by NPR21.
DESCRIPTION MarketPulse Pro Lower The lower-pane companion to MarketPulse Pro.
Displays the raw Agreement Level as a continuous color-coded oscillator (0–15), giving traders a clear numeric read on how many of the 15 internal indicators agree on trend direction.
Built on the foundation of Christopher84's Confirmation Candles Lower concept and enhanced with Momentum Filter scoring, HTF Trend Alignment, and Adaptive Confirmation Factor support by NPR21.
